healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: NAMING MATTERS — this is the company's home city. The facility is officially 'UMass Memorial Medical Center – Marlborough Campus' on Union Street; the former Marlborough Hospital became a licensed campus of UMass Memorial. Safest copy is 'UMass Memorial Medical Center – Marlborough Campus (formerly Marlborough Hospital)'. Nashoba Valley Medical Center in nearby Ayer closed in August 2024 — never reference it.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
